# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in SynArc, please report it responsibly.

Do not open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, email us directly at: devsynarc@gmail.com

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if any)

We will respond within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Testnet | ✅ Active |
| Mainnet | 🔜 Coming soon |

## Smart Contract Security

All SynArc contracts are deployed on Arc Testnet.
Contract addresses are publicly verifiable on testnet.arcscan.app
